InstitutionalDepartmentName: Department of biological psychology and neuroergonomics
TaskDescription: Participants were presented with 56 streetview images. Each image was presented nine times in combination with a scale prompt (1000ms) followed by a fixation cross (500ms) before image onset. Image presentation lasted 3000ms, followed by one of the nine scales (SAM (arousal, valence, dominance - 9 point), beauty, hominess,     openness, safety, fascination, stress (all 5-point)) until response was given via mouseclick. Image x scale combinations were presented in randomized order. 56 stimuli were split into two experimental blocks with a break in between. Baseline (3min) was recorded at the beginning and end of the experiment.
